title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that cloud engineering juniors should shift focus from coding prowess alone to mastering fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) while using AI agents effectively. The video contends that understanding what to build and why has become more critical than implementation speed as AI automates routine code generation tasks like Kubernetes manifests and Lambda functions.
